\tzpentry{ID3897}{Gyromagnetic Connection Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3897 introduces Gyromagnetic Connection Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{A} = \left|\frac{R_{\text{out}}}{R_{\text{in}}}\right|^2 = 1 + \frac{4\pi m\Omega_{\text{gyro}}}{\omega(\omega - m\Omega_{\text{gyro}})} \times \frac{\sinh(2\pi r_+/\lambda)}{\cosh(2\pi r_+/\lambda) + \cos(2\pi\omega/\omega_c)} \end{equation}
